# TS9217

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Static assertion failed: {message}
```

## Explanation

A staticAssert() or compileError() check failed.

The condition evaluated to false at compile time, or compileError()
was reached unconditionally.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
